prompt: Using the person in the attached reference image as the sole protagonist, depict a glamorous and cinematic urban landscape where a sophisticated metropolitan commercial district is taken over by a giant fashion advertisement of that person. Faithfully maintain facial features, hairstyle, hair color, eye impression, age, body type, clothing, shoes, atmosphere, and expression format (photorealistic, anime, or illustration) from the reference image. Do not inherit the background, floor, shadows, lighting, margins, or original pose; reconstruct the image using only the person as a new urban advertisement. Do not simply paste the entire reference image onto the giant billboard. Fix the composition: place a vertically long giant advertisement centered on the full body of the reference person, viewed from the front or nearly from the front, slightly to the right of the center. In the left foreground, place the same person large enough on a small, clean high-altitude work platform projecting from the building. Include one auxiliary advertisement each on the left and far right, with a sense of depth showing a boulevard stretching into the distance. Do not make the city a super-distant view or the person a tiny dot. The giant advertisement should be a non-digital large panel rather than an LED. Design the advertisement background anew using ivory, pale gray, and silver tones with abstract brushstrokes in accent colors from the clothing. Do not reuse the original background or include text, logos, or brand names. The person on the platform is the same person in the ad. They should be standing naturally, having paused their work. Ensure the face, full body, clothing, and spray can are clearly visible. They should hold a spray can naturally in one hand below waist level with the nozzle pointing down; do not depict them reaching for the ad, spraying, or creating mist/trails. The other hand should rest naturally. The combination of the finished brushstroke background, platform, and spray can should indicate the person is involved in creating their own giant advertisement. The setting is a glamorous fictional metropolis with glass skyscrapers and wide boulevards. Fix the time to a clear, brilliant evening where warm sunset light coexists with street lights beginning to turn on. If the reference is a photo, finish it as a high-quality live-action fashion ad or movie scene. If anime/illustration, maintain the original style and unify the entire scene in that same style. Aspect ratio: 1:1.
